character.bio: A US Air Force pilot who fights for his country, Guile succeeded in dismantling Shadaloo and avenging his friend Charlie. He enjoys living the family man life, but new battlefields await him.

guile_crouching_medium_punch_m.note: * 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

guile_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Can only be canceled on the 1st active frame if the attack hitsForces the opponent into a standing position

guile_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard KnockdownForces a juggle state when the first attack lands as a Punish Counter

guile_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

guile_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent for a counter

guile_full_bullet_magnum_m.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

guile_rolling_sobat_m.note: Invincible to low attacks from frames 7 - 1723 frames of recovery (34 frames overall) added if the attack misses

guile_reverse_spin_kick_h.note: Invincible to throws and low attacks on frames 4 - 28Forces a juggle state knockdown on counter hitProduces a crumple stun on PunisH Counter

guile_guile_high_kick_h.note: Forces a juggle state when the attack lands for a Punish CounterForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent for a counterCan be canceled into a special move from frames 18 - 19

guile_recoil_cannon.note: Can cancel into a special move or Super Art from frames 8 - 9

guile_drake_fang.note: Produces a ground bound on Counter or Punish Counter

guile_l_sonic_boom_l.context: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_l_sonic_boom_l.input: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) (Hold ←) → + LP
guile_l_sonic_boom_l.note: Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

guile_perfect_timing_l_sonic_boom_l.note: Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

guile_m_sonic_boom_m.context: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_m_sonic_boom_m.input: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) (Hold ←) → + MP
guile_m_sonic_boom_m.note: Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

guile_perfect_timing_m_sonic_boom_m.note: Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

guile_h_sonic_boom_h.context: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_h_sonic_boom_h.input: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) (Hold ←) → + HP
guile_h_sonic_boom_h.note: Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

guile_perfect_timing_h_sonic_boom_h.note: Can transition to the normal Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

guile_od_sonic_boom.context: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_od_sonic_boom.input: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) (Hold ←) → + P
guile_od_sonic_boom.note: Can transition to Overdrive Sonic Break (Attack available during Super Art 2) from frames 12 - 20

guile_l_somersault_kick_l.context: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_l_somersault_kick_l.input: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) (Hold ↓) ↑ + LK
guile_l_somersault_kick_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 7Considered airborne from frames 8 - 36* Does 800 individual damage after the 3rd active frame

guile_perfect_timing_l_somersault_kick_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 7Considered airborne from frames 8 - 36* Does 1000 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frame

guile_m_somersault_kick_m.context: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_m_somersault_kick_m.input: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) (Hold ↓) ↑ + MK
guile_m_somersault_kick_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8Considered airborne from frames 8 - 38* Does 800 individual damage after the 3rd active frame

guile_perfect_timing_m_somersault_kick_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8Considered airborne from frames 8 - 38* Does 1000 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frame

guile_h_somersault_kick_h.context: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_h_somersault_kick_h.input: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) (Hold ↓) ↑ + HK
guile_h_somersault_kick_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 8 - 40* Does 800 individual damage after the 3rd active frame

guile_perfect_timing_h_somersault_kick_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 8 - 40* Does 1000 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frame

guile_od_somersault_kick.context: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_od_somersault_kick.input: (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) (Hold ↓) ↑ + K
guile_od_somersault_kick.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 11Considered airborne from frames 8 - 37* Does 700 individual damage from frames 3 - 4

guile_l_sonic_blade_l.note: Can transition to all Sonic Break variations from frames 35 - 40

guile_m_sonic_blade_m.note: Can transition to any Sonic Cross from frames 40 - 46

guile_h_sonic_blade_h.note: Can transition to any Sonic Cross from frames 50 - 54

guile_od_l_sonic_blade.note: Can transition to any Sonic Cross from frames 34 - 39

guile_od_m_sonic_blade.note: Can transition to any Sonic Cross from frames 34 - 39

guile_od_h_sonic_blade.note: Can transition to any Sonic Cross from frames 34 - 39

guile_l_sonic_cross.context: (During Sonic Blade) (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_l_sonic_cross.input: (During Sonic Blade) (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) → + LP

guile_m_sonic_cross.context: (During Sonic Blade) (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_m_sonic_cross.input: (During Sonic Blade) (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) → + MP

guile_h_sonic_cross.context: (During Sonic Blade) (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect)
guile_h_sonic_cross.input: (During Sonic Blade) (Press + an attack button simultaneously to change effect) → + HP

guile_od_sonic_cross2.note: Produces a wall splat after it hits

guile_sonic_break_single_shot.note: Can transition to a regular Sonic Break (available while Level 2 Super Art is active) from frames 13 - 21

guile_sonic_break_variation.level: (During Solid Puncher)(During Sonic Boom or Sonic Break)
guile_sonic_break_variation.note: Can transition to a regular Sonic Break (available while Level 2 Super Art is active) from frames 13 - 21, up to 3 times* The last transition's recovery is reduced by 1 frame

guile_od_sonic_break.level: (During Solid Puncher)(During OD Sonic Boom or OD Sonic Break)
guile_od_sonic_break.context: (During Solid Puncher) (During Sonic Boom or Sonic Break)
guile_od_sonic_break.input: (During Solid Puncher) (During Sonic Boom or Sonic Break) P
guile_od_sonic_break.note: Can transition to Overdrive Sonic Break  (available while Level 2 Super Art is active) once from frames 13 - 21

guile_sa1_sonic_hurricane_up_h.note: Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

guile_sa1_sonic_hurricane_side.note: Invincible to throws and strikes from frames 1 - 8Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

guile_sa2_solid_puncher.note: Sonic Break can be performed after this technique is activated

guile_sa3_crossfire_somersault.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
guile_sa3_crossfire_somersault.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) (Hold ←) →←→ + K
guile_sa3_crossfire_somersault.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 14Considered airborne from frames 12 - 44Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter*Does 3000 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frameApplied only when canceling a special move

guile_ca_crossfire_somersault.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
guile_ca_crossfire_somersault.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) (Hold ←) →←→ + K
guile_ca_crossfire_somersault.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 14Considered airborne from frames 12 - 44Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter*Does 3500 individual damage when the attack lands after the 3rd active frameApplied only when canceling a special move

guile_dragon_suplex.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

guile_judo_throw.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

guile_flying_mare.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

guile_flying_buster_drop.input: (During a jump) (When near opponent) ← + LP + LK
guile_flying_buster_drop.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

guile_backward_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

guile_drive_impact_blitz_combination.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

guile_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
guile_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
guile_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

guile_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

guile_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
guile_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
guile_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

guile_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

guile_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

guile_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

guile_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
guile_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
guile_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
